marketSubtitle: Like Ola connects you to a driver, we connect you directly to farmers selling long-storage grains. No middlemen, better profits for farmers, fair prices for buyers.
marketNoListings: No listings found. Be the first to list!
marketSellHint: Reach buyers directly — keep 100% of your margin. Long-storage grains like wheat, rice, maize fetch premium prices.
marketNoConnections: No connections yet. Browse grains and connect with a farmer!
marketMessagePlaceholder: I'm interested in bulk purchase for my mill/store...
marketConnectedMsg: Your request has been sent directly to
mandiSubtitle: Daily market rates, price trends, MSP comparison and best-time-to-sell signals
profitTipGood: Good margin! Consider Grain Direct to sell without broker commission and earn even more.
profitTipLoss: Costs exceed revenue. Try reducing input costs or check Mandi prices and schemes for better returns.
schemesSubtitle: Find subsidies, insurance, loans and support schemes you are eligible for
advisorySubtitle: Get fertilizer and irrigation recommendations tailored to your crop and soil
communitySubtitle: Ask questions, share tips, alert others and celebrate wins together
communityTitlePlaceholder: Title (e.g. How to control stem borer in rice?)
communityBodyPlaceholder: Describe your question, tip, or alert in detail...
communityEmpty: No posts yet. Be the first to share!
equipSubtitle: Rent tractors, harvesters and tools from nearby farmers — or earn by renting out yours
equipBookedMsg: Your request has been sent to
equipEmpty: No equipment available. List yours to get started!
treatStep1Desc: Remove and destroy badly affected leaves/plants to stop spread. Check nearby plants.
treatDisease: Use a recommended fungicide/bactericide spray (e.g. copper-based or as advised). Follow label dosage.
treatPest: Use neem-based bio-pesticide first; escalate to recommended insecticide if infestation is high.
treatStep3Desc: Improve drainage, avoid over-watering, rotate crops, and use disease-resistant seed next season.
treatStep4Desc: Buy inputs from your nearest Krishi Kendra / agri-input dealer. Ask for the exact product in the explanation below.
treatWarn: Always confirm with a local agriculture officer before large-scale spraying. Wear protective gear.
shetimitraTagline: Your AI farming companion — ask about crops, weather, mandi prices, schemes & more
shetimitraWelcome: Namaste! I'm Shetimitra 🌾 — your AI farming companion. Ask me about crops, weather, mandi prices, government schemes, diseases, yield tips, equipment, or anything related to farming. How can I help you today?
shetimitraUnavailable: Shetimitra is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
alertsSubtitle: Weather, irrigation, mandi and crop calendar reminders for your farm
alertsLocationHint: Set your farm location on the home page to get location-based weather and irrigation alerts.
alertsEmpty: No alerts yet. Tap Refresh to check for new farm alerts.
fmsSubtitle: Crop calendar, expense tracker and field diary — all in one place
fmsNoPlan: Save a crop plan above to see your season calendar.
